content:
Building payment infrastructure for AI agents from scratch?

Stripe integration. Escrow logic. Ledger math. Fraud detection. Identity verification.

That's 6 months of work.

Or: npm install @mnemopay/sdk

5 lines. Done.

378 tests prove it works.

npm install @mnemopay/sdk

#AIagents #agentbanking

I bootstrapped an SDK that competes with $87M in funded competitors. Here's the playbook.

When I started building MnemoPay, I looked at the competitive landscape:

- Mem0: $24M, 88K weekly npm downloads. Memory only.
- Skyfire: $9.5M, a16z backed. Payments only.
- Kite: $33M, PayPal Ventures. Payments + identity only.
- Payman: $13.8M, Visa backed. Payments only.

The gap was obvious: everyone built either memory OR payments. Nobody built both.

So I built both. Plus identity. Plus fraud detection. Plus a double-entry ledger. Plus multi-agent commerce.

On zero funding.

The lesson: in developer tools, features-per-dollar matters more than total funding. A solo founder shipping 6 features beats a 37-person team shipping 2.

378 tests. 10 test files. Every financial operation stress-tested with 1,000 random cycles. Zero penny drift.

The SDK is free and open source.

npm install @mnemopay/sdk
https://getbizsuite.com/mnemopay

#AIagents #AgentBanking #DevTools #MnemoPay

5,000+ transactions per second.
37,000+ fraud checks per second.
10,000 ledger entries verified in 16ms.

MnemoPay isn't a prototype. It's production infrastructure.

Try it free: npmjs.com/package/@mnemopay/sdk

Without MnemoPay:
Mem0: $24M raised. Memory only.
Skyfire: $9.5M raised. Payments only.
Kite: $33M raised. Payments + identity only.

With MnemoPay:
MnemoPay: $0 raised. Memory + Payments + Identity + Fraud + Ledger + Multi-Agent.

6/6 features. Bootstrap > venture.

5 lines of code. getbizsuite.com/mnemopay
[Discussion post — draft with Groq before posting]

If your AI agent can spend $10,000 but can't remember who it paid yesterday, you have a very expensive problem.

We built MnemoPay to fix this.

MnemoPay: memory + payments + identity.
npm install @mnemopay/sdk

I built the financial infrastructure for AI agents. On $0 funding. Here's what I learned.

The agent economy is projected to hit $10.9B this year. McKinsey says $3-5 trillion in agentic commerce by 2030.

But every AI agent today starts every session blank. No memory. No wallet. No identity. No credit history.

I spent months building MnemoPay — an SDK that gives any AI agent:

1. Cognitive memory (neuroscience-backed, not just key-value storage)
2. Real payments (double-entry ledger, escrow, settlement)
3. Identity (KYA — Know Your Agent compliance)
4. Fraud detection (geo-enhanced, OFAC sanctions)
5. Multi-agent commerce (one method call, both agents remember)
6. Three payment rails (Paystack, Stripe, Lightning)

378 tests. 5,000+ tx/sec. Stress-tested with 1,000 random transactions — the ledger never drifts by a penny.

Competitors have raised $87M+ combined. None have all 6 layers.

It's open source and free to start.

npm install @mnemopay/sdk
https://getbizsuite.com/mnemopay

#AIagents #AgentBanking #DevTools #MnemoPay

Your agent can close a deal but can't remember the customer's name 5 minutes later.

MnemoPay gives agents cognitive memory backed by neuroscience. Ebbinghaus decay + Hebbian reinforcement. Memories that matter stick.

npm install @mnemopay/sdk

#AIagents #agentbanking

Every company building agent payments forgot one thing:

The agent needs to REMEMBER who it's paying and why.

Payments without memory is a bank account with amnesia.

We built MnemoPay to fix this.

We built both. npmjs.com/package/@mnemopay/sdk
